zh.Gudhem, Västra Götaland, Sweden: 瑞典維亞斯特拉 格塔藍德古德姆
zh.Søderup, Rødekro, Sønderjylland, Danmark: 丹麥奧德藍德洛德可洛奧德盧普
zh.lifeSummary: Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen於大約1043年出生在丹麥洛斯吉爾德。他於1081年與Adèle de Flandre在丹麥結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1086年7月10日在丹麥歐登塞享年44歲，埋葬在丹麥歐登塞。

zh-hans.Gudhem, Västra Götaland, Sweden: 瑞典維亞斯特拉 格塔藍德古德姆
zh-hans.Søderup, Rødekro, Sønderjylland, Danmark: 丹麦奧德藍德洛德可洛奧德盧普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen于大约1043年出生在丹麦洛斯吉爾德。他于1081年与Adèle de Flandre在丹麦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1086年7月10日在丹麦歐登塞享年44岁，埋葬在丹麦歐登塞。

nameMeanings.name: Svendsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Bjorn, Erik, Knut, Lars, Niels, Per, Thor, Astrid, Britt, Carsten, Einer, Evald.
Danish and Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name Svend, from Old Norse Sveinn, originally a byname meaning ‘boy, servant’. Compare Svenson , Swanson , Swendsen , Swensen , and Swenson .

variants.name: Svenson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Sven, Erik, Bjorn, Dagny.  German Kurt, Gerhard, Irmgard.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Svensson  . This surname is also found in Denmark, northern Germany, and Norway.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish   Svensen   or   Svendsen  , cognates of 1.

variants.name: Svenningsen
meanings: Danish and Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name Svenning, a variant of Sveinung, from Old Norse Sveinn (see Svendsen ) + the suffix -ung ‘son of’.

variants.name: Swendsen
meanings: Americanized form of Danish and Norwegian   Svendsen  . Compare   Swensen  .

nameMeanings.name: Knud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: 'den
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄧, see   Deng  .
Chinese: possibly from the Romanization of certain Chinese personal names of some early Chinese immigrants in the US.

Origin undetermined. — Note: It is possible that in the population figure published by the US Census Bureau the Dutch case-inflected definite article de ‘the’, which forms first part of surnames such as Den Bleyker and Den Boer , is in some instances counted as an independent surname. Compare Ten .

en.lifeSummary: Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen was born about 1043, in Roskilde, Denmark. He married Adèle de Flandre in 1081, in Denmark. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 10 July 1086, in Odense, Denmark, at the age of 44, and was buried in Odense, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen est né environ 1043, à Roskilde, Danemark. Il a épousé Adèle de Flandre en 1081, à Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 10 juillet 1086, à Odense, Danemark, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Odense, Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen wurde um 1043 in Roskilde, Dänemark geboren. Er hat 1081 in Dänemark Adèle de Flandre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Juli 1086 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Odense, Dänemark und wurde in Odense, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen è nato il circa 1043 nel Roskilde, Danimarca. Lui sposato Adèle de Flandre nel 1081, nel Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 luglio 1086, nel Odense, Danimarca, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Odense, Danimarca.

ja.Gudhem, Västra Götaland, Sweden: スウェーデンvaストラ グoタランドグドヘム
ja.Søderup, Rødekro, Sønderjylland, Danmark: デンマークスoンデルジイランドルoデクロスoデルップ
ja.Roskilde, Denmark: デンマークロスキルド
ja.lifeSummary: Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsenは約1043年にデンマークロスキルドで生まれた。1081年にデンマークでAdèle de Flandreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1086年7月10日にデンマークオデンゼで44歳で死去し，デンマークオデンゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen(은)는 대략 1043년 덴마크 로스킬드에서 태어났다. 그는 1081년 덴마크에서 Adèle de Flandre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1086년 7월 10일 덴마크 오덴스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 오덴스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen nasceu aproximadamente 1043, em Roskilde, Dinamarca. Ele casou-se com Adèle de Flandre em 1081, em Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de julho de 1086, em Odense, Dinamarca, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Odense, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen родился около 1043 г. в местности роскаилд, Дания. Он женился на женщине по имени Adèle de Flandre в 1081 г. в местности Дания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 10 июля 1086 г. в местности оденс, Дания в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности оденс, Дания.

es.lifeSummary: Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen nació aproximadamente 1043, en Roskilde, Dinamarca. Se casó con Adèle de Flandre en 1081, en Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de julio de 1086, en Odense, Dinamarca, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Odense, Dinamarca.
